title: Intelligence Maturity Report — Proof-of-Learning Scorecard (FTD-056-ODYSSEY)

milestones.name: Trade Volume Baseline
milestones.why: 100 trades minimum for any statistical inference

milestones.name: Multi-Context Exploration
milestones.why: Confirms RL explores multiple market condition combinations

milestones.name: Context Differentiation
milestones.why: Proves RL assigns distinct quality scores — not random noise

milestones.name: Toxic Context Detection
milestones.why: Proves RL identifies and rejects genuinely harmful contexts

milestones.name: Mature Context Formation
milestones.why: Q-values at 50+ visits are statistically reliable estimates

milestones.name: Cross-Session Persistence
milestones.why: Proves persistence layer retains and compounds prior learning

milestones.name: Alpha Discovery
milestones.why: First evidence the system can identify positive-EV conditions

milestones.name: Statistical Edge Confirmation
milestones.target: Bootstrap PF CI lower bound > 1.0 over ≥200 trades
milestones.why: Rigorous statistical proof of positive expectancy

milestones.name: Regime-Specific Alpha
milestones.why: Proves RL found alpha in a specific market structure

milestones.name: Adaptive Session Profitability
milestones.target: Current session PF > 1.0 with RL guidance active
milestones.why: Ultimate proof: RL guidance produces profitable trading sessions

phase_guide.PHASE_1_EXPLORATION: RL exploring contexts — no learning evidence yet
phase_guide.PHASE_2_DIFFERENTIATION: RL differentiating contexts — learning confirmed, no alpha yet
phase_guide.PHASE_4_ALPHA_DISCOVERY: First positive Q contexts — early alpha evidence present
phase_guide.PHASE_5_PROFITABLE_INTEL: Statistically confirmed positive expectancy — institutional grade

honest_assessment.primary_obstacle: Signal quality — all contexts negative Q. Breakeven WR = 40.7%, actual WR = 23.8%. RL architecture is sound; signals need improvement.

final_answer: NOT YET — system has proven 5/10 milestones. Learning architecture is working correctly. Profitability requires signal WR improvement, not RL redesign.
